name: @bydey/tusk
description: SQL-first PostgreSQL migrations for Node.js and Bun
author: Bydey

scripts.test:unit: bun test core/baseline-compatibility.test.ts core/checksum-validation.test.ts core/create-migration.test.ts core/init-project.test.ts core/read-migrations.test.ts core/migration-lock.test.ts core/migration-records.test.ts core/migration-resolution.test.ts core/migration-status.test.ts core/plan-migrations.test.ts core/rollback-plan.test.ts core/rollback-target.test.ts core/validate-migrations.test.ts core/doctor.test.ts utils/checksum.test.ts utils/cli-output.test.ts utils/cli-parser.test.ts utils/doctor-output.test.ts utils/errors.test.ts utils/fs-errors.test.ts utils/filename.test.ts utils/logger.test.ts utils/runtime.test.ts utils/test-helper.test.ts utils/version.test.ts adapters/postgres-client.test.ts adapters/pg/sql-generator.test.ts adapters/pg/introspection.test.ts adapters/pg/locking.test.ts adapters/pg/query.test.ts mcp/server.test.ts scripts/ci-workflows.test.ts scripts/quality/mutation-report.test.ts scripts/validate-release-version.test.ts scripts/verify-hosted-provider.test.ts
scripts.test:db: bun test adapters/pg.test.ts adapters/postgresjs.test.ts core/run-migrations.test.ts core/init-migration.test.ts core/track-migrations.test.ts mcp/server-db.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: bun run build && TUSK_PACKAGE_SMOKE_SKIP_BUILD=1 bun test
scripts.test:coverage: TUSK_SMOKE_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@127.0.0.1:5433/migrate_tool_test bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage core/baseline-compatibility.test.ts core/checksum-validation.test.ts core/create-migration.test.ts core/init-project.test.ts core/read-migrations.test.ts core/migration-lock.test.ts core/migration-records.test.ts core/migration-resolution.test.ts core/migration-status.test.ts core/plan-migrations.test.ts core/rollback-plan.test.ts core/rollback-target.test.ts core/validate-migrations.test.ts core/init-migration.test.ts core/doctor.test.ts core/run-migrations.test.ts core/track-migrations.test.ts utils/checksum.test.ts utils/cli-output.test.ts utils/cli-parser.test.ts utils/doctor-output.test.ts utils/errors.test.ts utils/fs-errors.test.ts utils/filename.test.ts utils/logger.test.ts utils/runtime.test.ts utils/test-helper.test.ts utils/version.test.ts adapters/postgres-client.test.ts adapters/pg.test.ts adapters/postgresjs.test.ts adapters/pg/sql-generator.test.ts adapters/pg/introspection.test.ts adapters/pg/locking.test.ts adapters/pg/query.test.ts cli.test.ts plugins/elysia.test.ts mcp/server.test.ts mcp/server-db.test.ts
scripts.quality:agentic: bun run build && bun run quality:dead-code && bun run quality:crap && bun run quality:mutation
scripts.quality:release:fast: bun run quality:dead-code && bun run quality:crap && bun run quality:audit
scripts.quality:release: bun run quality:dead-code && bun run quality:crap && bun run quality:mutation && bun run quality:audit
